title: Property Consultant - Synergy Property Development - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Synergy Property Development - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Synergy Property Development, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Kanpur operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Synergy Property Development:
Synergy Property Development is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kanpur, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Synergy Property Development!
